description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python Package Linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with Python versions 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, upgrade pip, install dependencies, check code formatting with black, and run tests with pytest.
